task_completion.description: Import the narration audio onto a track named 'Narration - David Chen'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ardour timeline shows an audio track with a name containing 'Narration' and 'Chen' (e.g., 'Narration - David Chen') that contains an imported audio region.

task_completion.description: Split the region at 10 and 20 seconds and remove the middle segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Looking at the timeline ruler, there is a visible gap in the audio region on the narration track starting at the 10-second mark and ending at the 20-second mark.

task_completion.description: Apply fade-ins and fade-outs to the remaining audio segments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audio regions before the 10s gap and after the 20s gap show visible fade-in and fade-out curves (shaded triangles/curves at the top corners of the regions) at their boundaries.
The marker lane at the top of the Ardour timeline shows a marker named 'Intro' near the beginning of the timeline and a marker named 'Conclusion' near or after the final audio segment.

task_completion.description: Export the session mix as a WAV file containing 'narration' in the filename to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Ardour export dialog shows the destination path '/home/ga/Audio/documentary_export/' with a filename containing 'narration' and ending in '.wav', OR a file manager/terminal shows this file successfully created in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour GUI to perform the audio editing tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ardour application interface open with active interactions (timeline edits, marker placements), rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file using Ardour rather than faking it via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence in the terminal of using commands like 'cp', 'mv', or 'touch' to place a fake '.wav' file in the export directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass GUI interaction by manually editing the Ardour session XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) is shown open and editing a '.ardour' session file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Track name must contain the keywords 'narration' and 'chen'. The middle segment cut must be exactly between 10 seconds and 20 seconds on the timeline. Markers must be named 'intro' and 'conclusion'. The final export directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Audio/documentary_export'.
